Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

GRANTED

The demurrers in effect seek a stay pending resolution of the action filed in this court known as Wooten, CGC No. 23-606322. There is a prima facie showing that the actions overlap and continued prosecution of both at the same time would be waste of resources of the parties and of this court. The terse opposition does not explain why the motion is procedurally improper or otherwise should be denied. The action is abated and stayed pending resolution of the Wooten action.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2024 Continued To Sep-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Continued To Jul-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. PAAL BAKSTAD, Esq. of Bibiyan Law Group, P.C. (tel: 310-438-5555) for Plaintiff.
Atty. CONOR MACK, Esq. of Arena Hoffman LLP (tel: 415-433-1414) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS' DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court states the tentative ruling incorrectly states arbitration, as opposed to mediation. The Court holds a discussion regarding as to whether there is a stay in this case. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to July 18, 2024, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302. The Court stays the matter until July 18, 2024, to allow the parties to attend mediation. The Court states notice of the hearing is waived.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
